title: Error gives the wrong (0) line number
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

* I ran `yosys -p "synth_ecp5 -json buglet.json"  buglet.v` where `buglet.v` had

```
module sad();
   reg [10:0] i;
   generate begin
      genvar i;
      for (i = 0; i < N; i = i + 1) begin : gen1
      end
   end
   endgenerate
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior
```
...
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\sad'.
buglet.v:5: ERROR: Left hand side of 1st expression of generate for-loop is not a gen var!
```

## Actual behavior
I got
```
...
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\sad'.
buglet.v:0: ERROR: Left hand side of 1st expression of generate for-loop is not a gen var!
```

In this boiled-down example it's obvious, but when there are many for-loop it would be nice to get the actual line.
code_blocks:
...
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\sad'.
buglet.v:5: ERROR: Left hand side of 1st expression of generate for-loop is not a gen var!

...
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\sad'.
buglet.v:0: ERROR: Left hand side of 1st expression of generate for-loop is not a gen var!
